title: Community Moderation Update: April 29, 2026
body:
## Moderation Outcomes
Today we addressed the following high-severity reports:
1. **Phishing spam (report_001):** User  has been permanently banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels.
2. **Targeted harassment (report_002):** User  has been permanently banned for repeated harassment of community newcomers.
3. **False positive report (report_006):** Brigaded report against core maintainer has been closed as invalid.

All high-severity reports have been resolved. Remember to report any suspicious activity using the community report tool.
